tool_calls.name: explain_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT pr.number, pr.closes_linear FROM github_pull_requests pr WHERE pr.state = 'merged' AND pr.closes_linear IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM linear_issues li WHERE li.id = pr.closes_linear AND li.state != 'done')"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
